title: chrysochlamys myrcioides
intro: Chrysochlamys myrcioides, also known as the 'False Myrtle', is a plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Chrysochlamys myrcioides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments.
